overview: The EPUB filter allows you to process EPUB (Electronic Publication) documents. It handles encoding detection via Byte-Order-Mark and supports configurable default encoding for input files.
processingNotes: If the file has a Unicode Byte-Order-Mark, the corresponding encoding (e.g. UTF-8, UTF-16) is used; otherwise the default encoding specified in filter options is used.
For UTF-8 output: if input was also UTF-8, a BOM is written only if one was detected in the input; if input was not UTF-8, no BOM is written.
No parameter editor is available; custom configurations must be edited with a text editor.
